name: Premium Hoodie — Dark Chocolate Brown
description: Elevate your everyday fit with our premium 100% cotton fleece hoodie. Built for streetwear comfort, it features a soft, brushed interior that keeps you warm without the bulk. Designed with dropped shoulders and a roomy kangaroo pocket, this hoodie delivers that clean, laid-back vibe. Ribbed cuffs and hem add structure, while the relaxed, loose fit gives you a generous silhouette that stays sharp — not oversized. Made to move with you, made to last, and made for the streets. Fit: Oversized. Length: Regular length. Cotton fleece is created by brushing the inside of the fabric to form a warm, cosy texture. This gives the hoodie its soft, plush feel while keeping it lightweight and comfortable. Perfect for streetwear, it provides warmth without compromising mobility or style. Composition: 100% cotton, 350 GSM. Care: Machine wash cold (30°C).

details.material: Cotton fleece is created by brushing the inside of the fabric to form a warm, cosy texture. This gives the hoodie its soft, plush feel while keeping it lightweight and comfortable. Perfect for streetwear, it provides warmth without compromising mobility or style.

name: Crop Hoodie — Black
description: A cropped hoodie designed for queens who masters the art of chill. Crafted in ultra-soft fabric ,it wraps you in comfort while delivering street-smart style. Whether you're lounging,layering or stepping out,it keeps the energy balanced- effortlessly relaxed yet sharp with attitude . This hoodie isn't just about staying cozy; it's about owning your vibe-subtle, fierce and undeniably you. Fit: Oversized. Length: Crop length. name: Premium Sweatshirt — Black

With its soft ,brushed interior and loose fit, it gives you room to move while keeping your look sharp. Dropped shoulders and ribbed trims brings that effortless street vibe,while the clean cut keeps it from going sloppy. name: Zip Hoodie — Black
description: Zip up, zone out. This long‑sleeve, regular‑fit hoodie is your everyday flex piece—laid‑back but never basic. Made from premium cotton fleece with a soft, brushed interior, it serves comfort that hits different. The full‑zip front lets you switch from chill to street mode in seconds, while the ribbed cuffs and hem lock in that clean silhouette. Rock it solo or layer it up—this one’s built to move, built to last, and built to keep your vibe unmatched. Fit: Regular fit. Length: Regular length.
